Coming soon

Azlin Workspace

A native productivity suite - Office, Video, Calendar, a Drive alternative, Mail and more - each a real desktop app sharing one fast engine. Fast, local-first, and free of the busywork. We're building it on the open-source Azlin UI Toolkit. Check back soon.

Explore the UI toolkit →

Apps in the suite

Office Coming soon

Documents, spreadsheets and presentations in open formats.

Video Coming soon

Native calls and meetings without a browser tab.

Calendar Coming soon

Fast, local-first scheduling, synced on your terms.

Drive Coming soon

A storage and file-sync alternative on hardware you control.

Mail Coming soon

A fast native mail client that respects your inbox.

…and more

Notes, contacts and the everyday tools a suite needs.
